prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GR4XTVCSACK-5PC-SML-BLCK-1 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 5pc Gold Rush Gold Panning Tweezer and Vial Combo Set Description: The ASR Outdoor Tweezer and Vial Combo Set is the essential utilitarian tweezer for inspecting not only gold but precious gems and minerals as well.

The tweezers feature an optical-quality glass lens with 4x magnification, these tweezers will show fine detail without distortion. Made of stainless steel, the blades have precision needle points ideal for manipulating tiny objects. They fold up compactly to fit easily into a tool box, on-the-go kit, survival kit and much more.

The included 4 collection vials are essential to keeping your gems safe and contained. Search Terms: gold panning fine recovery glass vial flake collection magnifier loupe 18k nugget paydirt mat storage testing kit for Features: - Mag Tweezer Specifications: 4x Magnification; Glass Lens: 1" Diameter - Includes (4) small glass gold flake collection vials with screw top lid - Simple and reliable, just what you want when collecting and storing raw gold precious metals and gem stones === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-pc Small Black Gold Panning Tweezer Vial Set

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-pk Small Black Gold Panning Tweezer and Vial Set

tokens.name: Gold Panning Tweezer and Vial Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4X Magnification Glass Lens, Stainless Steel Precision Needles, 4 Collection Vials, Gold And Gem Recovery

openai.title_differentiation: 4X Magnification Glass Lens, Precision Needle-Point Tweezers, 4 Screw-Top Vials, Compact Foldable Design
